name: lookup_ls_sonicstar_by_searchText
note: Expected divergence: vanilla 2.2.0 has no ls_sonicstar. Rust-overlay searches songTitle, artistName, album for a case-insensitive substring (three fields only, mirroring the TS code; the TS docstring claims four). Live parity via tests/sonicstar_live_parity.rs (step 10).
